Est. Suva · Fiji · By Appointment

✻The cut, the shave, the standard.

Precision barbering and hot-towel shaves for the man who keeps his edge. In the heart of Suva — no rush, no guesswork, just a sharp finish every time.

Book Your Appointment Explore the services →
Skin Fades ✻Hot-Towel Shaves ✻Beard Sculpting ✻Scissor Cuts ✻Walk The Walk ✻ Skin Fades ✻Hot-Towel Shaves ✻Beard Sculpting ✻Scissor Cuts ✻Walk The Walk ✻
Fig. 01

A proper barbershop, done right.

The Standard is built on one idea: a man's haircut should be worth sitting still for. We take our time, we get the line right, and you walk out looking like the best version of yourself.

Warm towels, a clean chair, an honest conversation, and a finish that holds for weeks. Whether it's your first visit or your fiftieth, you get the same answer every time — the standard.

More about the shop →
Fig. 01 — The chair
✻ The list

What we do

No. 01

The Standard Cut

Consultation, scissor or clipper cut, hot towel, and a clean finish. Tailored to your head, not a template.

$35 FJD
No. 02

Skin Fade

A seamless, blade-tight fade blended into the length up top. The detail people notice without knowing why.

$40 FJD
No. 03

Hot-Towel Shave

The full ritual — warm towels, oil, a straight-razor shave, and aftercare. The closest, calmest shave you'll get.

$45 FJD
No. 04

Beard Sculpt

Shaped, lined, trimmed and conditioned. We map the beard to your jaw so it grows out clean, not patchy.

$25 FJD
No. 05

Cut & Beard

The full reset. Standard cut paired with a beard sculpt, finished together so the whole look lines up.

$55 FJD
No. 06

The Father & Son

Two chairs, two cuts, one good morning out. Bring the young man in for his first proper barber visit.

$60 FJD
Fig. 02 — The room
Fig. 02

Built in Suva, for Suva.

We started The Standard because the city deserved a barbershop that treated a haircut like a craft, not a queue. Every barber here trains on the fundamentals first — the line, the blend, the finish — before they ever touch a fade.

It's the kind of place you settle into. Good chairs, good talk, and a cut that earns the walk back through the door. That's the whole promise.

✻ Word of mouth

What the chair says

“

Best fade I've had in Suva, full stop. They actually listen before they pick up the clippers — I've been coming back monthly ever since.

Tevita R. — Regular since opening
“

Took my old man in for the hot-towel shave for his birthday. He hasn't stopped talking about it. Proper old-school service.

Aman P. — Suva

Ready when you are. Book your chair.

✻ Walk-ins welcome, appointments preferred
✻ Open Tue–Sun
✻ Call or message to lock a time
